name: See's Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first five ingredients in a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a saucepan, bring the sugar and evaporated milk to a boil.
3. Boil briskly for 9 minutes after coming to a boil.
4. Stirring constantly, add the boiling mixture to the first bowl.
5. Mix well.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered shallow pan and refrigerate.
7. Once set, slice into squares and serve. The fudge will keep in the refrigerator for months when stored properly.
